pipeline_architecture.name: ProphetPipe
pipeline_architecture.description: Pipeline-style Prophet time series forecasting with functional composition

outputs.description: Function that prepares Prophet data format from a ProphetPipe

prepare_prophet_data.description: Convert data to Prophet's required ds/y format with date validation

outputs.description: Function that adds external regressors to a ProphetPipe

add_regressors.description: Add external variables that influence the forecast

outputs.description: Function that adds holiday effects to a ProphetPipe

add_holidays.description: Add holiday effects with custom or built-in holiday calendars

outputs.description: Function that configures Prophet model in a ProphetPipe

configure_prophet.description: Configure Prophet model parameters and seasonality settings

outputs.description: Function that adds custom seasonality to a ProphetPipe

add_custom_seasonality.description: Add custom seasonal patterns beyond default yearly/weekly/daily

outputs.description: Function that fits Prophet model in a ProphetPipe

fit_prophet.description: Train the Prophet model on historical data

outputs.description: Function that generates forecasts from a ProphetPipe

make_forecast.description: Generate future forecasts for specified periods

outputs.description: Function that generates forecasts with regressors from a ProphetPipe

forecast_with_regressors.description: Generate forecasts with future values for external regressors

outputs.description: Function that performs cross-validation on a ProphetPipe

cross_validate_model.description: Evaluate model performance using time series cross-validation

outputs.description: Function that calculates forecast metrics from a ProphetPipe

calculate_forecast_metrics.description: Calculate forecast accuracy metrics (MAE, RMSE, MAPE, coverage)

outputs.description: Function that prints forecast metrics from a ProphetPipe
Function that plots forecast from a ProphetPipe

plot_forecast.description: Visualize forecast results and decomposed components

outputs.description: Function that plots cross-validation from a ProphetPipe

plot_cross_validation.description: Visualize cross-validation performance across different horizons

outputs.description: Function that saves Prophet model from a ProphetPipe

save_prophet_model.description: Save trained Prophet model and configuration to disk

outputs.description: Function that performs hyperparameter tuning on a ProphetPipe

hyperparameter_tuning.description: Optimize Prophet hyperparameters using cross-validation grid search

pipeline_data_structure.data: Main DataFrame with ds/y format and regressors
pipeline_data_structure.models: Dictionary of configured and fitted Prophet models
pipeline_data_structure.forecasts: Dictionary of forecast results with metadata
pipeline_data_structure.cross_validation_results: Dictionary of CV results and performance metrics

example_complete_pipeline: ProphetPipe.from_dataframe(df) | prepare_prophet_data('date', 'sales') | add_regressors(['marketing_spend']) | add_holidays(holidays_df) | configure_prophet(growth='linear') | fit_prophet() | make_forecast(periods=30) | cross_validate_model('365 days', '90 days', '30 days') | calculate_forecast_metrics('prophet_model_forecast') | plot_forecast('prophet_model_forecast', show_components=True)
